title: astrantia major subsp. minor
intro: Astrantia major subsp. minor, also known as the great masterwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Apiaceae and native to Europe. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Astrantia major subsp. minor include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as acting as a natural remedy for respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
